entity.summary: Professional trading interface within the broader Kraken exchange ecosystem, publicly launched on December 22, 2022 for advanced spot, margin, derivatives, and related trading workflows.
entity.notes: Kraken Pro is a product and trading surface of the broader Kraken exchange, not a separate legal exchange operator. The separate canonical row is retained because it is part of the frozen active-CEX queue; future lineage or product-boundary work should review whether it should remain independent.

expected.summary: Professional trading surface within the broader Kraken exchange ecosystem.
expected.notes: Launch date updated from Kraken’s official announcement introducing Kraken Pro on 2022-12-22.

events.title: Kraken Pro publicly launched
events.description: Kraken announced the public launch of Kraken Pro as its advanced trading platform on December 22, 2022.
events.notes: Product launch inside the broader Kraken exchange ecosystem.

evidence.title: Announcing Kraken Pro: The Secure Trading Platform for Advanced Clients
evidence.notes: Official public-launch announcement for Kraken Pro.
